data.name: The Lustful Bride
data.detailed_description:
主角是一位年輕的新娘，她與新郎一同抵達婚禮現場。然而當他們走向祭壇時，迎接他們的是身著全裸的證婚人。儀式起初進行得十分正常：主婚人詢問他們是否誓言忠貞，並準備好彼此結為夫妻。兩人皆回答「我願意」。
接著主婚人說道：「現在，為了印證這段婚姻……新娘，親吻你丈夫的陰莖吧。」新娘望向新郎，這才發現他根本沒有陰莖。她轉頭看向主婚人，看見他那巨大的陰莖，便說：「我寧願親吻你的。」
從那一刻起，一切都變了。新娘跪倒在地，開始撫摸主婚人。兩人就在祭壇前沉溺於激情之中，而新郎則站在一旁，對眼前發生的事深感痛苦。

遊戲特色：
• 全程語音對白與字幕。
• 生動的卡通風格與富有表現力的動畫。
• 婚禮儀式氛圍迅速升級為親密而緊張的場景。
• 三位主要角色——新娘、新郎與主婚人——的情感反應。
• 根據玩家的決定，故事將發展出不同的走向。

主角是一位年輕的新娘，她與新郎一同抵達婚禮現場。然而當他們走向祭壇時，迎接他們的是身著全裸的證婚人。儀式起初進行得十分正常：主婚人詢問他們是否誓言忠貞，並準備好彼此結為夫妻。兩人皆回答「我願意」。

data.short_description: 《慾火新娘》是一款卡通風格的露骨成人視覺小說。一場普通的婚禮儀式，竟在祭壇前演變成一段突如其來的激情與禁忌慾望的故事。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: The Lustful Bride
data.detailed_description:
The main character is a young bride who arrives at her wedding with her groom. But when they approach the altar, they are greeted by a completely naked officiant. The ceremony begins normally: the officiant asks if they swear to be faithful and are ready to take each other as husband and wife. Both answer “Yes.”
Then the officiant says: “And now, to seal the marriage… bride, kiss your husband’s penis.” The bride looks at the groom and realizes he has no penis. She turns to the officiant, sees his large penis, and says, “I’d rather kiss yours.”
From that moment on, everything changes. The bride drops to her knees and begins to caress the officiant. They give in to passion right at the altar, while the groom stands nearby, deeply distressed by what is happening. The ceremony turns into a story of unexpected attraction, where boundaries crumble before our eyes.

Game Features:
• Fully voiced dialogue and subtitles.
• A vibrant cartoon style with expressive animation.
• The atmosphere of a wedding ceremony that quickly escalates into an intimate and tense scene.
• Emotional reactions from the three main characters: the bride, the groom, and the officiant.
• Different story paths depending on the player’s decisions.

data.short_description: The Lustful Bride is an explicit adult visual novel in a cartoon style. A typical wedding ceremony turns into a story of sudden passion and forbidden desire right at the altar. Instead of kissing her groom, the bride begins to caress the naked emcee while the groom stands nearby.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 700 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
